selectionPatterns.description: Select a single Tailwind utility class (e.g. 'flex', 'p-4', 'hover:bg-blue-500').
Expand selection to the full list of space-separated utility classes.
Expand selection to the entire @apply rule including directive and semicolon.
Expand selection to the entire CSS rule block including selector and braces.
Expand selection to the entire @layer block including contents.
Expand selection to the full class attribute including quotes.
